items.scenario: You are attending a jazz concert next Friday with three friends, and you just discovered that the tickets you purchased are for the wrong date because of a mistake on the venue's booking page.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Castillo. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the mistake with the ticket dates
Explain how many people are affected by the error
Ask whether the tickets can be exchanged for the correct night
items.subject: Wrong date on our jazz concert tickets

items.scenario: You are applying for a summer research program at another university, and the application requires a letter of recommendation from a professor. The deadline is in two weeks, and you took your professor's seminar last semester.
items.direction: Write an email to Professor Ibarra. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain why you are applying to the research program
Ask whether the professor would be willing to write the letter
Give the deadline for submitting the recommendation
items.subject: Recommendation letter for summer research program

items.scenario: Your friend borrowed your bicycle two weeks ago for a short errand and still has not returned it. You need the bike this weekend for a cycling trip with your study group, and the trip leader asked everyone to confirm gear tonight.
items.direction: Write an email to Jordan. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain why you need the bicycle back this weekend
Ask when your friend can return it
Offer to pick it up if that is easier
items.subject: Return of my bicycle before this weekend's trip

items.scenario: You ordered a set of wireless headphones online three weeks ago as a birthday gift for a friend, and the tracking page still shows the package as 'processing.' The company's return window is normally thirty days from the order date, and the birthday is this coming Saturday.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Farrow. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the delay with your order
Explain why you need the headphones before Saturday
Ask what options are available to speed up delivery
items.subject: Delayed shipment for a birthday gift order
